append-empty-a4-page.title: Append Empty A4 Page to PDF
append-empty-a4-page.description: Loads an existing PDF, appends an empty A4‑sized page at the end, and saves the result.

insert-blank-page.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Position
insert-blank-page.description: Demonstrates inserting a blank page at index three in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-multiple-empty-pages.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages.description: Demonstrates adding empty pages to a PDF by iterating over a list, respecting the evaluation mode limit of four pages.

read-pdf-page-dimensions.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
read-pdf-page-dimensions.description: Loads a PDF and logs each page's width and height to the console.

resize-page-seven-letter.title: Resize Page Seven to Letter Size
resize-page-seven-letter.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of page seven to Letter format using SetPageSize.

resize-pages-a5.title: Resize PDF Pages to A5 Size
resize-pages-a5.description: Demonstrates how to loop through a PDF's pages and resize each one to A5 dimensions.

rotate-page-four-90-degrees.title: Rotate Fourth Page by 90 Degrees Clockwise
rotate-page-four-90-degrees.description: Creates a PDF with four pages, rotates the fourth page 90 degrees clockwise, and saves the result.

change-odd-pages-orientation.title: Change Odd Pages from Landscape to Portrait
change-odd-pages-orientation.description: Demonstrates how to convert odd-numbered landscape pages to portrait orientation by adjusting their MediaBox.

delete-last-three-pages.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages.description: Demonstrates how to remove the last three pages of a PDF using PageCollection.Delete.

insert-empty-page-custom-size.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size at Beginning
insert-empty-page-custom-size.description: Demonstrates how to insert an empty page of 200 × 300 points at the start of a PDF document.

append-page-from-another-pdf.title: Append a Page from Another PDF
append-page-from-another-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, copy a page from another PDF, and append it to the end of the target document without altering its content.

rotate-all-pages-180.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pages-180.description: Demonstrates how to rotate every page of a PDF document by 180 degrees using Aspose.Pdf.

convert-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
convert-portrait-to-landscape.description: Demonstrates how to change each page orientation by swapping the width and height of the MediaBox, effectively converting portrait pages to landscape.

insert-blank-page-after-each.title: Insert Blank Page After Each Existing Page
insert-blank-page-after-each.description: Demonstrates how to double a PDF's page count by inserting a blank page after every existing page.

set-page-rotation-parity.title: Set Page Rotation Based on Page Number Parity
set-page-rotation-parity.description: Creates a PDF and rotates even-numbered pages by 90 degrees while leaving odd-numbered pages unrotated.

export-page-dimensions.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-page-dimensions.description: Extracts the width and height of each page in a PDF and writes them to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-page-at-index-two.title: Insert Page from External PDF at Specific Position
insert-page-at-index-two.description: Demonstrates loading two PDFs, extracting a page from the external PDF, and inserting it into another PDF at index two while preserving its original size and rotation.

set-custom-page-size.title: Set Custom Page Size for First PDF Page
set-custom-page-size.description: Demonstrates how to change the size of the first page of a PDF to custom dimensions (500 × 700 points) using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pages-reverse-order.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
rotate-pages-reverse-order.description: Demonstrates rotating each page of a PDF 90 degrees clockwise, processing pages from the last to the first.

copy-mediabox.title: Copy MediaBox from One Page to Another
copy-mediabox.description: Copies the MediaBox rectangle from page 8 and applies it to page 12 of a PDF.

insert-empty-pages-midpoint.title: Insert Empty Pages at Document Midpoint
insert-empty-pages-midpoint.description: Shows how to calculate the middle of a PDF and insert empty pages there, limited to four pages due to evaluation mode restrictions.
